title: Who's hungry? — Papa asks, kids cheer, drive to eat
prompt: Front-cabin shot inside @jeep-interior — view through the open windshield from outside-front looking IN. Sunny daylight outside (the family has just left the magic forest, this is now a normal paved road, bright clear sky, regular trees beyond). @Papa already in the passenger seat (RIGHT-FRONT of frame), facing FORWARD through the windshield, big delighted grin, mouth moving as he speaks. @Sara already visible in the rear right seat behind Papa, hand raised high in the air with a huge smile. @Eva already visible in the rear left seat, bouncing in her booster, both arms up, mouth wide open in a joyful shout. Mama is at the wheel (LEFT-FRONT of frame, partially out of the frame edge, only a hint of her blonde ponytail visible — NOT a bound character, no full face visible). Papa is NEVER turned backward, ALWAYS facing forward. Papa (eyes facing forward, big grin): "Okay adventurers — WHO is hungry?" Sara (hand raised high, big smile): "MEEEEEEEEEEEE!" Eva (bouncing, both arms up): "MEMEMEMEMEMEMEEEE!" Papa (laughing): "Then let's find some FOOD!" Sara: "BURGERS!" Eva: "AND FRIES!"
